review_title: Squarespace is great, especially for beginners!
description: Overall, I've had a very positive experience with Squarespace! I haven't had to use customer service, but from everything else I've seen, I think it would be easy to navigate.
author: Emily J.
pros: Squarespace is very user friendly, especially compared to a few of the other website building services that I have tried to use in the past. Everything is nice and neat, and you can use premade blocks or make your own.
cons: I really don't have anything negative to say about Squarespace. It meets my needs for what I need it to do!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Overall a good option
description: I do really like the company and many of the options that are available to build websites and use many different tools within the site.
author: Trisha H.
pros: The Customization was great. It is very convenient to use the analysis tools and monitor the metrics of the page.
cons: I found it clunky to build even with templates available. I did not like how difficult it was change menues.

review_title: Not worth the money, but technically does the job.
description: Never returning, but it's not a uniquely horrible product. I could use it, but I would rather put my money into tools that offer more rather than just charging more.
author: Anna B.
pros: I liked the high amount of templates. You really can just put your images and copy into most of them and end up with a beautiful website. It had decent SEO features. Somewhat easy to navigate and use.
cons: It is not in any way worth the cost. They charge more for nearly every aspect of service from payments to web hosting to domains. Customer support is kind, but lacking. The user interface is buggy and often extremely confusing. I also constantly encountered bugs on my site.

review_title: Great product, price is becoming a barrier
description: Good! The platform is easy to use and set up for any website owner. The Squarespace team has a lot of different tutorials as well. The price point is starting to be the biggest pain factor for myself as a small business owner.
author: Tracie B.
pros: It is very user friendly for people who have limited-no experience with website design. I love the ability to integrate third party apps.
cons: The cost keeps rising for the same features. The value of the items for the price they charge is starting to become a problem for me as a small business owner.

review_title: Web design made fun!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It makes building websites simple and very customizable. I love being able to drag and drop elements, and adjusting for mobile is also intuitive. It's easy to show my portfolio, my art shop, invoice clients and take payments.
cons: there are a few limitations to animation options. It can also get expensive for people who are still starting out.

review_title: Website with a purpose
description: Overall it has been good. Once I got the hang of it, I was able to knock out a website. Now adding things or adjusting is not so scary
author: Fran D.
pros: The website that we built is very nice and finally at a place we feel we want it. it did take us a bit of time.
cons: At first it was overwhelming, not having background in website development I became frustrated and it took me a while to get it done. I was finally able to do it.

review_title: Short time to experience the platform
description: Overall my experience with Squarespace has been ok, but at the end I changed because of the short time for the free trial
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like about Squarespace, is that has an easy journey to create website for small businesses with the opportunity of enhance with different features.
cons: What I dont like about Squarespace, is that doesn´t have too much opportunity to customize and the free trail is too short to understand and make the desicion.

review_title: Squarespace Is The Place
description: Overall I think Squarespace is a very powerful and simple platform, especially for those new to website creation. Although there's cheaper alternatives I think this is a very sensible and logical option.
author: Trinidad F.
pros: Squarespace is very user friendly and easy to use. I really like the various templates, designs, and choices offered.
cons: Squarespace has limited abilities to customize certain aspects in the website design process. Also, for anything extensive or complex this is probably not the best choice when creating a website.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Squarespace in your space
author: ALEXANDER G.
pros: The thing that brought me the most joy about Squarespace was the design and how supportive they were.
cons: The only thing that really threw me for a loop was the cost after the free trial and the limited access after that.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great platform for hosting a website.
author: Andie T.
pros: Squarespace is a wonderful platform for building a website, tracking analytics, and customization with code.
cons: There are bugs from time to time with Squarespace related to coding and AI integration that could be improved.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great All-in-One Platform for Event Management
description: Overall, Squarespace made it easy to manage my small business and host creative events for kids. It allowed me to display past and upcoming workshops, accept payments, and keep in touch with customers. It’s reliable, visually appealing, and ideal for business owners who want to handle everything themselves.
author: Victoria H.
pros: I liked how easy it was to build a clean, professional website without needing technical skills. The event sales page features worked smoothly, and I loved being able to list upcoming art and craft sessions, sell tickets, and keep everything organized in one place. The templates were simple to customize for my business style.
cons: I wish there were more flexible options for event ticket reporting and email confirmations. Customer support was very helpful, but the live chat wait times could be shorter.

review_title: Squarespace in the Right Hands of Creative Director
author: Johnson A.
pros: I use Squarespace in more than four companies where I currently work. It allows me to seamlessly create and design websites and landing pages. In addition, I am able to host websites and emails as well as access c-panel from anywhere across any device.
cons: Since 2018 when I started using Squarespace, I have never encountered an issue or bug that lasted for more than 24 hours without being resolved.

review_title: Beautiful website for two sides of business, mostly no issue
description: Overall built a beautiful website for two sides of my business that are connected. Some more advanced wishes not possible with the given templates but overall it’s great
author: Becky R.
pros: I like how great my website looks. I have so many compliments and it was relatively easy to figure out myself.
cons: It’s somewhat complicated when you need to do more advanced features. I have to google and chatgpt for answers where It should be more intuitive and user friendly to navigate. Or have more easily available info.

review_title: Best Website Software for Non-Coders
description: I love Squarespace. I manage many websites for my own businesses, for family, and for clients. Hands-down it’s the best website for someone who doesn’t know or doesn’t want to learn coding.
author: Kimberly G.
pros: Squarespace is an easy to use all-in-one platform. It produces clean, fresh websites with a few clicks. There are numerous ways to go deeper for fine tuning a website. I find it easy to show clients how to end up managing their own website.
cons: The templates are great, but they are limited. Some of the individuals modules aren’t as strong as I’d like. The ‘Menu’ module for restaurants or pricing is complex. It doesn’t allow much variability in use.

review_title: Great product for easy and quick website launch.
description: Overall, we had a very pleasant experience with Squarespace, especially with the Acuity scheduler integration. The only two reasons we switched to a different platform for hosting our site was because a web designer friend of mine asked to help us with our website so we could work on creating some paywall aspects and other multimedia offerings. The other reason was because we no longer needed Acuity because our clinic upgraded to a full-feature EHR program to do notes, scheduling, and payment.
author: Susan K.
pros: It was very helpful to have templates to design our website; without a specific designer, we were able to launch a full-functioning website within 1 day of starting.
cons: I wish there were more options to change the font and sizes of text, there were only a few options to choose between headers, titles, etc.

review_title: Great functionality, easy to update
description: Overall experience is excellent. I have used their websites for almost 10 years now and find it works a lot better for me than a wordpress site.
author: Catriona R.
pros: We use squarespace for all our sites. The tools are intuitive, easy to use and allow us to update our sites easily and regularly.
cons: The page upload speed is slow with messes a bit with our ability to access some google tools.

review_title: Square Space allows small businesses to do big professional business!
description: I love square space because I can send contracts and proposals and estimates to clients all for free on their online platform. Which as a small business owner makes me look professional and makes it easier for my clients and client management
author: Daniel R. S.
pros: I like square space because as a business owner I use their platform not just for payment processing but for contract creation. They have templates I can use and edit which makes it easy for my clients to e sigh for FREE
cons: I don't like the payment processing fees and website builder which is plain and doesn't have alot of features

review_title: Squarespace - For All Shapes and Sizes
description: Overall I am completely pleased with Squarespace. I feel all of the pros highly outweigh any cons that are involved.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I really enjoy the ease of Squarespace. It is very upfront in its ability to ensure usability for beginners as well as more in-depth processes for experts. It's easy, fast, and offers a great amount of support.
cons: While there are not many things I dislike about Squarespace, the very thing I enjoy is also a perplexing issue. Correct placement is a bit harder to achieve when using the website builder. Also, a colleague mentioned Squarespace, in the past, had problems with backing up work.

review_title: E-Commerce Platform, Sell your products in minutes.
description: Setting an ecommerce with squarespace was super easy, the told they give you to start are super helpful and I got my site up and running in just a couple of hours. Yes, hours.
author: Amos R.
pros: I can sell my products and services online and provides with all the tools to run my ecommerce, also I like that I can customize everything with my logo and colors to make it feel more personal.
cons: The only negative thing about Squarespace is that it doesn't support multi currencies, and sometimes my clients from outside the state have to use third parties to be able to acquire my services or buy my products.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A simple website builder with pro results!
description: The drag-and-drop features make it easy and intuitive to build pages, giving you the freedom to easily adjust layouts, add images, videos, and interactive elements. Each template can be customized to your specific needs, so your site doesn’t just look like another cookie-cutter design. Overall, a great choice for a website platform.
author: Stephanie M.
pros: Squarespace is an excellent platform for anyone who wants a professional-looking website without needing to write a code. The platform offers high-quality templates that are visually appealing right out of the box, and flexible enough to customize for any brand/style.
cons: There are a few limitations worth noting: The pricing is on the higher side compared to some competitors, especially for small businesses or personal sites. Third-party app integrations are also somewhat limited, so if you need very specialized functionality, you may feel restricted.

review_title: What’s Good in Squarespace
author: Felicia S.
pros: Squarespace allocates free CSS templates and only involves drag and drop editor functionality to create and design websites and landing pages.
cons: It has been easy for me to create highly responsive websites without coding with the hep of Squarespace, thus I can’t complain.

review_title: The Best Platform for Building Professional and Good Looking Websites .
description: With Squarespace creating a good looking site is with few clicks and has a editing suite that is comprehensive and easy to use.
author: Esami Allan J.
pros: Squarespace has a drag and drop interface that make creating good looking websites easy and with just few clicks even for non tech person.There are large number of plugins and extensions available. Plenty of customization to make your site look the way you want. Has powerful eCommerce capabilities.
cons: The customer service care are not always available via mobile phones which causes a lot of inconveniences in times of urgency.

review_title: Amazing, Love It!
description: It has been an incredible platform to build client's websites and create simple tutorials for them to manage their own sites. It is clean and user-friendly.
author: Amber M.
pros: What I love most about Squarespace is its intuitiveness. It is easy to design and easy to teach my clients how to manage it when I pass off ownership to them.
cons: Not much, maybe just that I would love to see Squarespace incorporate more for custom code. Otherwise it has really been great.

review_title: Squarespace is Super Dope. Powerful and Surefire Tool for Building Website.
description: 10/10 seamless experience with Squarespace.Has an intuitive design and gives much more of professionally designed templates.
author: Francesco B.
pros: I'm very impressed with Squarespace beautiful and customizable templates that make it easy to build professional websites and portfolio that builds credibility and attract clients. Has a rich drag and drop interface that make it simple for all user of all level to use it without needing the training. Offer incredible SEO capabilities making it an ideal choice for enhancing website search and engine visibility.
cons: All in one platform that offer great features .Lack any demerit for now.

review_title: Slick Design, simple setup & management
description: It offers a smooth and stylish website-building experience that's perfect for creatives and small businesses, though it may feel limiting for those needing advanced customisation or performance.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - Beautiful templates - professionally designed and mobile-responsive. - All-in-1 Platform - Easy to use - Strong branding tools
cons: - Limited customization - Higher tiers cost more than competitors for similar features. - Not ideal for large or complex online stores.
